overall.description: First-person exploration of a dimly lit wooden attic study in a video game. The player character slowly pans right across the room, revealing a desk with a green globe and oil lamp, a simple bed, and an elaborate astronomical tapestry depicting a scholar with a telescope. The atmosphere is moody and immersive with warm lamplight casting shadows across dark wood paneling and a patterned rug.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden attic study with desk and astronomical decor

agents.ego_description: slowly panning right while holding a light source, examining the desk area and initial room details

entered.detail: wooden writing desk with papers and objects scattered on surface
antique terrestrial globe with brass stand on the desk
lit oil lamp casting warm light on the desk surface
simple wooden bed frame with white mattress against the back wall
ornate hanging lantern suspended from the sloped ceiling
small window with blue-tinted glass panes showing dark night outside
large wall tapestry depicting a scholar with telescope against star chart background
dark ornate rug with circular geometric patterns covering the floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a cozy wooden attic room illuminated by warm lamplight. The camera focuses on a desk cluttered with a green globe, a lit oil lamp, and scattered papers. To the right, a simple wooden bed sits against the wall beneath a hanging lantern, while a large astronomical tapestry depicting a stargazing scholar covers the right wall. The player slowly begins panning right, revealing more of the room's detailed wood paneling and patterned rug.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden attic study with prominent astronomical tapestry

agents.ego_description: continuing to pan right, focusing on the detailed astronomical tapestry and the far corner of the room

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its slow rightward pan, the focus shifts from the desk to the elaborate astronomical tapestry, which now dominates the right side of the frame. The wooden bed becomes more central in the composition while the desk with its globe recedes toward the left edge. The tapestry's intricate details of the scholar and celestial instruments become clearly visible against the dark wood paneling, maintaining the room's warm, contemplative atmosphere.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, continuous rightward pan across a cozy wooden attic study, shifting focus from a cluttered workspace to an elaborate celestial display. It begins centered on a desk illuminated by a lit oil lamp, where a green globe and scattered papers sit beside a simple wooden bed. As the camera glides to the right, the desk recedes toward the edge of the frame while the bed moves into a more central position against the dark wood paneling. The scene then expands to reveal a large astronomical tapestry depicting a stargazing scholar, which gradually dominates the view. Finally, the intricate details of the celestial instruments on the fabric become fully visible, maintaining a warm and contemplative atmosphere across the patterned rug.
